EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S MOTION 1) TO COMPEL RWW PROPERTIES, LLC'S PERSON(S) MOST QUALIFIED TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; 2) TO COMPEL RWW'S RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY, AND 3) FOR SANCTIONS; GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOVING PAPERS. THERE IS NO RECORD THAT DEFENDANT RWW PROPERTIES, LLC OPPOSES THIS MOTION. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED: (1) CHASE'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITIONS IS GRANTED. RWW SHALL PRODUCE RESPONSES TO CHASE'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FORM INTERROGATORIES WITHIN SEVEN (7) CALENDAR DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. (2) WITHIN SEVEN (7) CALENDAR DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION, RWW SHALL PROVIDE DATES CERTAIN FOR THE DEPOSITION OF ITS PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE, TO TAKE PLACE WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. THE PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE IS/ARE ALSO ORDERED TO RESPONSE TO THE REQUESTS FOR INSPECTION ATTACHED TO THE DEPOSITION NOTICE BY THE DATE OF THE DEPOSITION(S). (3) RWW HAS WAIVED ANY AND ALL OBJECTIONS, INCLUDING OBJECTIONS BASED ON PRIVILEGE, TO THE WRITTEN REQUESTS FOR INSPECTION ATTACHED TO THE DEPOSITION NOTICE AND TO THE PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE DEPOSITION(S). (4) CHASE'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS OF $4,072 IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A's motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions Against Rww Properties Llc is Granted in part, for reasons set forth in defendant JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s moving papers. There is no record that defendant RWW Properties, LLC opposes this motion. It is hereby ordered: Chase's request for sanctions of $2,064 is granted. Sanctions shall be paid within ten (10) calendar days of Notice of Entry of the signed Order on this motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Notice Of Motion And Omtion 1) To Compel Rww Properties, Llc'S Person(S) Most Qualified To Appear At Deposition And Produce Documents; 2) To Compel Rww'S Responses To Written Discovery, And 3) For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN, TEL. NO. 409-4611 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. LISA BOWMAN OF BRYAN CAVE LLP, TEL. NO. 268-1990 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A's motion 1) To Compel Rww Properties, Llc'S Person(S) Most Qualified To Appear At Deposition And Produce Documents; 2) To Compel Rww'S Responses To Written Discovery, And 3) For Sanctions is Granted, for reasons set forth in defendant JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s moving papers. There is no record that defendant RWW Properties, LLC opposes this motion. It is hereby ordered: (1) Chase's Motion to Compel Discovery and appearance at depositions is granted. RWW shall produce responses to Chase's First Set of Special Interrogatories and Form Interrogatories within seven (7) calendar days of Notice of Entry of the signed Order on this motion. (2) Within seven (7) calendar days of Notice of Entry of the signed Order on this motion, RWW shall provide dates certain for the deposition of its Person(s) Most Knowledgeable, to take place within fourteen (14) days of Notice of Entry of the signed Order on this motion. The Person(s) Most Knowledgeable is/are also ordered to response to the Requests for Inspection attached to the Deposition Notice by the date of the deposition(s). (3) RWW has waived any and all objections, including objections based on privilege, to the written Requests for Inspection attached to the Deposition Notice and to the Person(s) Most Knowledgeable deposition(s). (4) Chase's request for sanctions of
$4,072 is granted. Sanctions shall be paid within ten (10) calendar days of Notice of Entry of the signed Order on this motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/JPT
